target: every candidate bowl has temporary ID, material note, condition note, dry-response observation
method: visual/tactile inventory review (design.md L2 Subsystem Plan)
action: Reject or re-ID bowls with unclear condition before tuning work

target: same measured fill volume reproduces same pitch after drain/refill
action: Revise fill-measurement method or vessel if not repeatable

target: bowl pitch response to water increments logged per bowl ID
method: controlled water increments + tuner/recording log (jal-tarang-wolfram-model.wl estimate curve as reference only)
action: Discard bowl or revise fill increments if response is erratic

target: mallet gives clear attack without chipping/muting/overdriving rim
method: comparative strike test across mallet candidates
action: Reject mallet family failing rim-safety or clarity criteria

target: support tray/cradle holds bowls stable without choking resonance
evaporation/handling drift over a session session stays within a repeatable margin
action: Add refill/reset step to session workflow if drift is unacceptable
